Product Features

  • UPGRADE YOUR BEDROOM with this lovely deluxe Metal Bed Frame with ornate European styling. This is the traditional look so many people prefer and enjoy. Just the right amount of fancy design to elevate this bed frame above those available in stores. It's the quick and easy way to give your bedroom an exciting new look
  • STURDY STEEL CONSTRUCTION supports up to 500 pounds of weight. This gives you a great night's sleep without the shaking, creaks, and vibrations of lesser frames that keep you awake. Made of solid steel with four metal canopy columns that will last and look good for years of daily use and enjoyment. Never any fear of bending or warping
  • PERFECTLY FITS YOUR QUEEN MATTRESS. This is universally sized to fit all standard queens. Mattress not included. This was carefully engineered to give the right fit without to much width or being too narrow. The black color is a favorite that goes with any decor, color scheme, or personal style
  • EASY TO ASSEMBLE with the included instructions. We generally include a few extra parts so you have plenty of everything needed. This makes for a pleasurable DIY experience that offers a professional quality bed frame you might expect to see in a fine hotel or expensive home. More than 12.4 inches of space under the bed, enough to store shoes, boxes, and other items
  • GREAT GIFT IDEA for anyone who needs a fine bed frame or wants to upgrade their current one. Excellent wedding present, for first apartment, or birthday, holiday, or special anniversary gift. Many get several to replace all the bed frames in their home. Get yours now while we have it in plentiful supply
